message:
fix: What's New modal shows recent merged PRs when no release notes (#8667)

Two fixes:
1. Add credentials: 'include' to the GitHub releases fetch so the
   session cookie is sent on localhost (was returning "Missing
   authorization" without it).
2. When release notes are empty (developer channel, or no releases),
   fetch the 20 most recently merged PRs and display them as a
   clickable list with PR number, title, and relative merge time.
   Each links to the PR on GitHub.

This ensures the What's New modal is never empty regardless of
which update channel the user is subscribed to.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
